nasb.text: Thus says the Lord, ‘If My covenant for day and night stand not, and the fixed patterns of heaven and earth I have not established,

esv.text: Thus says the Lord: If I have not established my covenant with day and night and the fixed order of heaven and earth,

cnv.text: 耶和華這樣說：‘我若沒有設立白晝和黑夜的約，或立定天地的定律，

ccb.text: 然而，耶和华说，‘正如我决不废弃我所定的昼夜交替和天地运行之律，
